name: StarTalk
description: Astrological translator for smart glasses. Set your signs. Tap. Get cosmic perspective.

permissions.microphone: Voice input for 'star' trigger and ambient speech processing.
permissions.display: Display astrological insights on the glasses HUD.

ai_declaration.governance: Apps uses @neuroverseos/governance with evaluateGuard() content checking, simulateWorld() rule evaluation, and gate-based behavioral adjustment.
